residual_findings.title: Future UX gap — intake re-trigger on existing Work (creator bootstrap creates a new Work; no daemon schedule add --work-id path)
residual_findings.source: P1 dev follow-up; closed in V1.49 P2
residual_findings.scope: nexus42 CLI / daemon schedule add surface
residual_findings.closure_note: V1.49 P2 (commit 0948cb87, merged at 1fa8002): creator works intake [<work_id>] subcommand added; schedules creative-brief-intake on an existing Work via input.work_id without a new Work row. The preset declares no gates, so the existing schedule-add handler accepts it on any existing Work. New hermetic CLI test handle_intake_schedules_creative_brief_intake_on_existing_work. Overlay §8.1 updated as Shipped (commit 9aea7091). QA verification: works 67+ → 84 lib tests pass; intake test passes.
residual_findings.closure_evidence: iteration/v1.49 @ 1fa8002 (P2 merge) + 0948cb87 (T1) + 9aea7091 (T3 docs); qc1/qc2/qc3 all Approve; qa.md post-fix wave
